critical_path_items: H0 Local Deterministic Gate (blocks all trading decisions)
Single Write Port Executor Module (prevents multi-path execution)
State Machine Core: SM-01, SM-02, SM-04
16_root_principles: Single Write Port — all order actions through ONE entry
AI Output ≠ Instant Command — AI forms leases, not direct orders
Strategy Cannot Bypass Risk — all intent through Guardian
Survival > Profit — won't spiral before can profit
Failure Default Contraction — uncertain defaults conservative
Learning ≠ Rewrite Live — learning isolated from execution
Exchange Disaster Protection — dual defense: local + conditional orders
Agent Maximum Autonomy — within P0/P1 hard limits, fully autonomous
Continuous Evolution — auto-learn, new strategies auto-live if paper passes
AI Resource Cost Awareness — cost_edge_ratio ≥ 0.8 triggers closure recommendation
Zero External Cost Runnable — basic op on L0+L1 only
Portfolio-Level Risk — correlation, overlaps, capital allocation, drawdown
6_agent_roles: OpenClaw (Conductor) — task distribution, conflict arbitration, resource allocation
Strategist (Decisions) — coin selection, strategy, parameters, allocation
Guardian (Risk) — dynamic risk control within P0/P1
Analyst (Evolution) — post-trade analysis, pattern discovery, incubation
Executor (Execution) — adversarial stops, maker priority, time awareness

DOC-01_CORE_RISK_DOCTRINE.document_title: Core Risk Doctrine / 核心風控教義

requirements.title: Single Write Port Principle
requirements.description: All order actions must pass through ONE controlled entry point only. No direct exchange writes from other modules.
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: Code audit must show ZERO exchange API write calls outside Executor module

requirements.title: Read-Write Separation
requirements.description: Research, learning, and GUI modules have read-only or suggestion-only capability. No direct execution path.
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: All research/learning/gui imports verified to have no exchange write capability

requirements.title: AI Output Forms Leases, Not Direct Orders
requirements.description: AI output is formalized as Decision Lease objects with TTL, revocability, idempotency. Not direct order placement.
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: All AI inference chains end with Lease object generation before executor consumption

requirements.title: Strategy Cannot Bypass Risk Gates
requirements.description: All trading intent must pass through Guardian approval. Risk gates are non-negotiable.
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: No order can be submitted without passing EX-01 pre-trade risk checks

requirements.title: Account Survival Over Profit
requirements.description: System is judged on 'won't spiral' before 'can profit'. Conservative defaults when uncertain.
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: System defaults to reduce/pause positions on any anomaly detection

requirements.title: Learning Isolated From Live Trading
requirements.description: ML training and model updates do not block execution. Suggestions only, no forced behavior changes.
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: Model training runs asynchronously, non-blocking to order execution

requirements.title: Trade Explainability - 6 Element Reconstruction
requirements.description: Every trade must reconstruct: pre-state, decision basis, risk approval, authorization, execution, result
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: Mock trade execution must log all 6 elements and be reconstructable post-hoc

requirements.title: Hard Stop-Loss Protection
requirements.description: Local stop-loss + exchange-side conditional orders as dual defense against disaster
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: Every position must have hard stop-loss set locally AND conditional order on exchange

requirements.title: Cognitive Honesty - Fact vs Inference vs Assumption
requirements.description: Clearly distinguish fact (exchange data), inference (derived), assumption (unverified). External data = inference-level
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: All data sources tagged with confidence level: FACT/INFERENCE/ASSUMPTION

requirements.title: Agent Maximum Autonomy Within Bounds
requirements.description: Within P0/P1 hard limits, Agent is fully autonomous on all trading decisions. Operator sets boundaries only.
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: Agent can make all decisions (coin, strategy, entry/exit) without human pre-approval if within P0/P1

requirements.title: Continuous Evolution Engine
requirements.description: System MUST auto-learn from trading behavior. New strategies auto-enter live if paper passes gate.
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: New strategies can auto-deploy after 7-day paper validation without human intervention

requirements.title: AI Resource Cost Awareness
requirements.description: Every AI call counted. cost_edge_ratio ≥ 0.8 (cost ≥ 80% of position margin) triggers closure recommendation
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: System calculates cost_edge_ratio per position; when ≥0.8, recommends closure

requirements.title: Zero External AI Cost Runnable
requirements.description: Basic operation on L0 (deterministic) + L1 (Ollama local) only. Cloud AI is enhancement, not requirement.
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: System must achieve positive net PnL using only L0+L1, before any L1.5/L2 cloud costs

requirements.title: Multi-Agent Formal Object Communication
requirements.description: OpenClaw Conductor + 6 Agents. Agents communicate via formal objects (not free text or RPC).
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: All inter-agent messages follow strict schema (SignalEvent, DecisionLease, ExecutionStatus, etc.)

requirements.title: Portfolio-Level Risk Monitoring
requirements.description: Monitor correlation exposure, strategy overlaps, capital allocation, broad-market drawdown
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: System calculates portfolio-level metrics: correlation matrix, strategy overlap %, max drawdown %, capital allocation per strategy

requirements.title: Net PnL Only Accountability
requirements.description: Mandatory cost components: fees, slippage, funding, AI cost, AI attention tax, infrastructure
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: All positions tracked with net_realized_pnl = realized_pnl - total_fees - ai_cost - slippage

requirements.title: AI Attention Tax Shelf Life
requirements.description: Every position has shelf life. When AI cost erodes expected margin, position no longer worth holding even if profitable.
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: Position closure logic includes check: if cost_edge_ratio ≥ 0.8 AND position_margin < cost, recommend closure

requirements.title: 6-Level Degradation Modes
requirements.description: NORMAL → CAUTIOUS → REDUCED → DEFENSIVE → CIRCUIT_BREAKER → MANUAL_REVIEW. Gradual recovery only.
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: System implements all 6 modes; can transition only to adjacent level; must define action set per mode

requirements.title: H0 Local Deterministic Gate - Execution Sequence
requirements.description: H0 gate is the FIRST check for all trading decisions. Non-negotiable, before all other gates (H1-H5).
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: Execution trace shows H0 gate executed and passed before any downstream H1-H5 processing

requirements.title: H0 Freshness Check
requirements.description: Validates market data age. Rejects decisions if data older than threshold.
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: H0 rejects order if market_data.timestamp < now - 1000ms

requirements.title: H0 Health Check
requirements.description: Validates system resources: CPU, memory, database, network connectivity
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: H0 checks: cpu_usage < 90%, memory_free > 1GB, db_latency < 100ms, network_loss < 5%

requirements.title: H0 Eligibility Check
requirements.description: Validates authorized product family and capability level for this decision
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: H0 checks: product_family in authorized_list AND capability_level >= required_level

requirements.title: H0 Risk Envelope Check
requirements.description: Position size, leverage, margin must be within P0/P1 limits
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: H0 rejects if: position_size > P1_limit OR leverage > P1_leverage OR margin_ratio < P1_minimum

requirements.title: H0 Cooldown Check
requirements.description: Auto-pause on consecutive losses. Re-enables after cooldown period.
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: H0 rejects new orders if consecutive_losses > threshold AND cooldown_expiry > now

requirements.title: H0 SLA Requirements
requirements.description: H0 must execute in <1ms with <1KB memory, pure in-memory (no external calls)
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: Benchmark shows H0 execution < 1ms, <1KB heap allocation, zero external I/O

requirements.title: Scanner Rate Limiting - 5 Minute Interval
requirements.description: Market scanning runs every 5 minutes minimum. Prevents thrashing and cost explosion.
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: Scanner runs on 5-minute interval; consecutive scans < 5min are rate-limited

DOC-03_MARKET_REGIME_DETECTION.document_title: Market Regime Detection / 市場制度檢測

requirements.title: Regime Classification System
requirements.description: Market regime classification with defined states and transition logic
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: System classifies market into defined regimes (e.g., TRENDING, MEAN_REVERT, VOLATILE, ILLIQUID) with clear transition rules

requirements.title: Regime Confidence Scoring
requirements.description: Each regime classification includes confidence score (0-100%)
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: Every regime classification includes confidence score; low confidence triggers degradation mode

requirements.title: Data Sources for Regime Detection
requirements.description: Uses market volatility, trend strength, correlation, volume profile, order book shape
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: Regime detection incorporates: IV, trend_strength, correlation_matrix, volume_profile, orderbook_imbalance

DOC-04_AGENT_LEARNING_EVOLUTION.document_title: Agent Learning Evolution / 代理學習進化

requirements.title: Agent Complete Autonomy (10 Domains)
requirements.description: No human pre-approval required for: coin selection, product family, strategy, entry/exit, P2 adjustment, execution method, AI resource allocation, stop-loss timing
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: Code path shows all 10 domains decided by agent without human gate

requirements.title: Agent Notify Post-Audit (3 Cases)
requirements.description: New strategy live (after paper verification), P2 adjustment, new product family enabled, AI model switch → notify operator (post-audit, no pre-approval)
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: System logs notification to operator after each event; operator review is post-hoc, not blocking

requirements.title: Tier Advancement Criteria
requirements.description: Define tier progression (L1-L5) with specific win rate, Sharpe ratio, consistency metrics
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: Each tier has explicit promotion criteria: L1→L2 requires win_rate > 20%, Sharpe > 1.0, etc.

requirements.title: Performance Metrics Tracking
requirements.description: Track win rate, Sharpe ratio, max drawdown, consistency, cost efficiency per strategy and tier
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: Daily performance report shows: win_rate, Sharpe, max_drawdown, cost_efficiency for each active strategy

DOC-06_CHANGE_AUDIT_LOG.document_title: Change Audit Log / 變更審計日誌

requirements.title: L0 Changes - No Approval
requirements.description: Bug fixes (trade logic unaffected), UI/visualization, log adjustments, documentation → no approval required
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: Git commits tagged with [L0_CHANGE] bypass approval workflow

requirements.title: L1 Changes - Agent Self-Governed
requirements.description: P2 micro-adjustments, strategy tweaks, backtest validation, new strategy incubation → auto-log, no pre-approval
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: L1 changes auto-logged with timestamp; system notifies operator post-execution

requirements.title: L2 Changes - Post-Audit Review
requirements.description: P2 range expansion, new product family, AI model upgrade → operator review within 24h, then auto-approval
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: L2 changes require operator signature within 24h; after 24h, auto-approved if no rejection

requirements.title: L3 Changes - Operator Pre-Approval
requirements.description: P0/P1 modification, constitution change, system architecture, paper→live first, auth matrix → requires written approval
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: L3 changes blocked until operator provides explicit written approval

requirements.title: Append-Only JSONL Log Format
requirements.description: Immutable log, no modification or deletion allowed. Structured JSON format.
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: All changes logged to append-only JSONL file; no delete/update operations allowed

requirements.title: Log Rotation and Archival
requirements.description: Logs rotate daily; old logs archived and compressed
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: Daily log rotation; old logs moved to archive/ directory; file size < 100MB per day

requirements.title: Thread-Safe Log Writing
requirements.description: All concurrent writes to log use mutual exclusion (lock-based or append-only queue)
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: Concurrent write test: 10 threads writing simultaneously → zero data corruption

requirements.title: JSONL Audit Trail - 6 Elements
requirements.description: Every trade logged with: pre-state, decision_basis, risk_approval, authorization, execution, result
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: Sample trade audit shows all 6 elements in JSONL record; missing element fails validation

requirements.title: Deterministic Replay Capability
requirements.description: Event log stored immutably. Can re-execute exact sequence of decisions.
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: Given event log of 10 trades, replay produces identical decision sequence and outcome

requirements.title: Circuit Breaker - Data Freshness
requirements.description: Market data stale > threshold triggers degradation mode
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: H0 gate checks data age; if > 1000ms, triggers CAUTIOUS mode

requirements.title: Circuit Breaker - API Latency Anomalies
requirements.description: REST latency > 5s or WebSocket > 3s triggers degradation
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: Monitor latency; if REST > 5s, transition to REDUCED mode

requirements.title: Circuit Breaker - Network Anomalies
requirements.description: Packet loss > 5%, network partition detected → degrade
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: Network monitor detects loss; if > 5%, transition to DEFENSIVE mode

requirements.title: Circuit Breaker - Margin Utilization
requirements.description: Margin > P1 limit → trigger degradation
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: H0 gate checks margin; if > P1_limit, trigger CAUTIOUS mode

requirements.title: Circuit Breaker - Consecutive Loss Pause
requirements.description: Consecutive losses > threshold auto-pauses trading
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: After 3 consecutive losses, trading paused for 1 hour minimum

requirements.title: Circuit Breaker - Volatility Anomalies
requirements.description: IV spike, gap anomaly > threshold → degrade
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: IV spike > 2x baseline OR gap > 5% triggers CAUTIOUS mode

requirements.title: Circuit Breaker - System Component Failure
requirements.description: Module crash, DB down, service failure → immediate degrade
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: Service health check failure triggers CIRCUIT_BREAKER mode within 1 second

requirements.title: Circuit Breaker - Reconciliation Failure
requirements.description: Exchange state ≠ local state (after 5 retries) → degrade
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: Reconciliation mismatch triggers 5 retries; if still failed, transition to MANUAL_REVIEW

requirements.title: Degradation Mode Action Matrix
requirements.description: Define allowed actions per mode: NORMAL, CAUTIOUS, REDUCED, DEFENSIVE, CIRCUIT_BREAKER, MANUAL_REVIEW
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: Matrix shows which order types, position sizes, strategies allowed per mode

requirements.title: Gradual Recovery (No Cross-Level Jumps)
requirements.description: Recovery must follow: MANUAL_REVIEW → CIRCUIT_BREAKER → DEFENSIVE → REDUCED → CAUTIOUS → NORMAL
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: State transition validation prevents jumping levels; must advance one at a time with time delay

requirements.title: Incident Classification Schema
requirements.description: Define incident types: Data Freshness, API Latency, Network, Margin, Loss, Volatility, Component Failure, Reconciliation
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: Incident_event object includes: type, severity (CRITICAL/HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW), timestamp, trigger_condition, action_taken

requirements.title: SM-04 Trigger Integration
requirements.description: Incident events trigger SM-04 risk state transitions
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: Incident.type='API_LATENCY' with severity=CRITICAL triggers SM-04 transition to RISK_WARNING or RISK_CRITICAL

SM-01_AUTHORIZATION_STATE_MACHINE.document_title: Authorization State Machine / 授權狀態機

requirements.title: State: PENDING_AUTH
requirements.description: Initial state. Decision awaiting approval.
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: New authorization starts in PENDING_AUTH; transition to AUTHORIZED requires approval

requirements.title: State: AUTHORIZED
requirements.description: Decision approved and ready to execute
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: AUTHORIZED state allows Executor to consume; can be revoked if execution hasn't started

requirements.title: State: EXECUTING
requirements.description: Decision being executed
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: EXECUTING state blocks revocation; transitions to EXECUTED on success

requirements.title: State: EXECUTED
requirements.description: Decision execution completed (terminal)
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: EXECUTED is terminal state; cannot transition further

requirements.title: State: REVOKED
requirements.description: Authorization withdrawn before execution
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: REVOKED can only be reached from PENDING_AUTH or AUTHORIZED; blocks execution

requirements.title: State: EXPIRED
requirements.description: Authorization time limit exceeded
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: EXPIRED auto-triggered after TTL expires; Executor rejects orders with expired auth

requirements.title: Transition: PENDING_AUTH → AUTHORIZED
requirements.description: Upon approval from authorized signer
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: Requires signature from authorized actor; records signer ID and timestamp

requirements.title: Transition: AUTHORIZED → EXECUTING
requirements.description: Upon Executor Agent taking action
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: Executor can only consume AUTHORIZED auth; records executor ID

requirements.title: Transition: EXECUTING → EXECUTED
requirements.description: Upon successful completion
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: Recorded with execution result and timestamp

requirements.title: Transition: AUTHORIZED → REVOKED
requirements.description: Before execution, if withdrawn
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: Only possible if still in AUTHORIZED state; records revoker and reason

requirements.title: Transition: PENDING_AUTH → EXPIRED
requirements.description: After timeout without approval
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: Auto-triggered after TTL; cleanup removes expired auths

requirements.title: Authorization Timeout Configuration
requirements.description: Timeout must be configured and enforced (5-300 seconds range)
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: Timeout is configurable per authorization type; default 300s

requirements.title: Approval Signature Requirement
requirements.description: Approval from distinct actor; can support M-of-N approval
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: Approval requires signature from authorized signer (not requester); supports M-of-N if configured

requirements.title: State Transition Logging
requirements.description: All transitions logged with timestamp, actor, old_state, new_state
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: Every SM-01 transition recorded in audit log with actor ID

requirements.title: Expired Authorization Cleanup
requirements.description: Expired authorizations must be explicitly cleaned up
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: Daily cleanup job removes EXPIRED auths older than 7 days

requirements.title: Fail-Closed: No Null Transitions
requirements.description: Authorization must exist and be valid before Executor can act. Null/missing auth = reject.
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: Executor refuses to execute any order without valid SM-01 AUTHORIZED state

SM-02_DECISION_LEASE_STATE_MACHINE.document_title: Decision Lease State Machine / 決策租約狀態機

requirements.title: Decision Lease Definition
requirements.description: Time-bound right to execute trading decision with specific parameters and actor assignment
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: Lease object includes: unique_id, start_time, end_time, entry_price, quantity, direction, actor, created_timestamp

requirements.title: State: LEASE_CREATED
requirements.description: Lease instantiated by Strategist
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: New lease starts in LEASE_CREATED; records creation timestamp and parameters

requirements.title: State: LEASE_ACTIVE
requirements.description: Lease is within valid time window
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: LEASE_ACTIVE is entered when: now >= start_time AND now <= end_time

requirements.title: State: LEASE_EXECUTING
requirements.description: Executor has started processing
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: LEASE_EXECUTING entered when Executor begins order submission; blocks other executors

requirements.title: State: LEASE_FULFILLED
requirements.description: Lease execution completed (terminal)
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: LEASE_FULFILLED is terminal; records fill quantity and final status

requirements.title: State: LEASE_EXPIRED
requirements.description: Lease time window closed
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: LEASE_EXPIRED auto-triggered when: now > end_time AND status ≠ FULFILLED

requirements.title: State: LEASE_REVOKED
requirements.description: Lease cancelled before completion
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: LEASE_REVOKED reachable from LEASE_CREATED, LEASE_ACTIVE, LEASE_EXECUTING (with restrictions); records revoker

requirements.title: State: LEASE_FAILED
requirements.description: Execution failed
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: LEASE_FAILED triggered on execution error; records error detail

requirements.title: Transition: LEASE_CREATED → LEASE_ACTIVE
requirements.description: Upon entering valid time window
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: Auto-triggered when: now >= start_time; recorded with timestamp

requirements.title: Transition: LEASE_ACTIVE → LEASE_EXECUTING
requirements.description: When Executor starts
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: Executor calls begin(); transition recorded with executor_id

requirements.title: Transition: LEASE_EXECUTING → LEASE_FULFILLED
requirements.description: Upon successful execution
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: Recorded when fill_qty >= lease_qty (or partial_fills_allowed AND lease_ended)

requirements.title: Transition: LEASE_ACTIVE → LEASE_EXPIRED
requirements.description: After time boundary
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: Auto-triggered when: now > end_time; no new orders accepted

requirements.title: Transition: LEASE_ACTIVE → LEASE_REVOKED
requirements.description: Manual cancellation
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: Revocable while in LEASE_ACTIVE; records revoker_id and reason

requirements.title: Transition: LEASE_EXECUTING → LEASE_FAILED
requirements.description: Execution error
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: Recorded with error_code and error_message

requirements.title: Lease Duration - Strict Upper Bound
requirements.description: Lease duration must have hard upper limit (typically seconds to minutes)
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: Lease with end_time > now + 5min is rejected; typical range 0.1-300 seconds

requirements.title: Lease Parameters - Immutable
requirements.description: Lease parameters are immutable once created
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: Any attempt to modify lease params (price, qty, etc.) after creation is rejected

requirements.title: Partial Fills - Explicit Flag
requirements.description: Partial fills only allowed if explicitly marked in lease
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: Lease has allow_partial_fills flag; if false, must achieve 100% fill or fail

requirements.title: Expired Leases - Auto-Transition
requirements.description: Expired leases must auto-transition (no human cleanup needed)
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: Expired leases auto-transition to LEASE_EXPIRED; no manual intervention required

requirements.title: Lease State Changes - Audit Events
requirements.description: Lease state changes trigger audit events
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: Every state transition generates audit event with: lease_id, old_state, new_state, timestamp, actor

requirements.title: Lease Unique ID
requirements.description: Unique ID per lease for idempotency
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: Lease.id is UUID; no two leases have same ID; Executor can safely retry with same lease_id

requirements.title: Lease Revocation Capability
requirements.description: Guardian/Operator can revoke leases
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: Guardian and Operator have revoke() permission; revocation logged with reason

requirements.title: Full Audit Trail - Emission to Outcome
requirements.description: Complete audit trail from lease emission through execution to outcome
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: Given lease_id, can reconstruct: created_by, parameters, state_transitions, execution_result

SM-04_RISK_GOVERNOR_STATE_MACHINE.document_title: Risk Governor State Machine / 風控狀態機

requirements.title: State: RISK_NORMAL
requirements.description: All metrics within normal bounds
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: RISK_NORMAL: all_metrics < threshold_warning; allows full trading

requirements.title: State: RISK_WARNING
requirements.description: One or more metrics in warning zone
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: RISK_WARNING: any_metric >= threshold_warning AND all_metrics < threshold_critical

requirements.title: State: RISK_CRITICAL
requirements.description: One or more metrics at critical level
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: RISK_CRITICAL: any_metric >= threshold_critical; triggers auto-lock within 1ms

requirements.title: State: RISK_LOCKED
requirements.description: Trading locked due to risk violation
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: RISK_LOCKED: no new orders accepted; only closing trades allowed

requirements.title: State: RISK_RECOVERY
requirements.description: Position unwinding in progress
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: RISK_RECOVERY: only closing/reducing orders allowed; no new entries

requirements.title: State: RISK_LIQUIDATION
requirements.description: Forced position closure
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: RISK_LIQUIDATION: system executes market close orders at best available price

requirements.title: Transition: RISK_NORMAL → RISK_WARNING
requirements.description: Threshold A crossed
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: When any_metric >= threshold_warning (e.g., 70% of limit), transition occurs; alerts generated

requirements.title: Transition: RISK_WARNING → RISK_CRITICAL
requirements.description: Threshold B crossed
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: When any_metric >= threshold_critical (e.g., 95% of limit), transition occurs

requirements.title: Transition: RISK_CRITICAL → RISK_LOCKED
requirements.description: Automatic enforcement
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: Automatic, no delay required; transition < 1ms; all pending orders rejected

requirements.title: Transition: RISK_LOCKED → RISK_RECOVERY
requirements.description: Position unwinding begins
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: Manual trigger required (Guardian approval); system marks time_locked

requirements.title: Transition: RISK_RECOVERY → RISK_NORMAL
requirements.description: Position normalized
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: Auto-triggered when all_metrics <= threshold_warning; records recovery_duration

requirements.title: Transition: RISK_CRITICAL → RISK_LIQUIDATION
requirements.description: Emergency liquidation
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: Triggered if RISK_CRITICAL lasts > 5 minutes; executes market close orders

requirements.title: Monitored Metrics
requirements.description: Position size, notional exposure, margin ratio, leverage
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: SM-04 monitors: position_size, notional_exposure, margin_ratio, leverage; recalculates on each price/fill update

requirements.title: Threshold A (Warning)
requirements.description: 70-85% of limit
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: Threshold_A configurable; default 75% of position limit

requirements.title: Threshold B (Critical)
requirements.description: 95-100% of limit
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: Threshold_B configurable; default 95% of position limit

requirements.title: Real-Time Calculation
requirements.description: Metrics calculated < 100ms frequency
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: Risk metrics updated on every price tick and fill; calculation latency < 100ms

requirements.title: CRITICAL → LOCKED Deterministic
requirements.description: Transition < 1ms deterministic
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: RISK_CRITICAL → RISK_LOCKED transition is synchronous; < 1ms latency

requirements.title: LOCKED → RECOVERY Approval
requirements.description: Requires manual Guardian approval
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: RISK_LOCKED can only transition to RISK_RECOVERY with explicit Guardian call

requirements.title: State Changes - Audit Logs
requirements.description: All transitions logged with actor and reason
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: Every SM-04 state change recorded: old_state, new_state, metric_values, timestamp, actor

requirements.title: Alert Generation
requirements.description: Generate alerts on each state transition
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: RISK_NORMAL→WARNING: alert_level=MEDIUM; CRITICAL→LOCKED: alert_level=CRITICAL; immediate notification

EX-01_PROTECTION_ANTI_HUNT.document_title: Protection & Anti-Hunt / 保護與反獵殺

requirements.title: Pre-Trade Risk Checks - Synchronous Blocking
requirements.description: All orders must pass risk validation before submission
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: Risk check executed before exchange.submit_order(); rejected orders logged

requirements.title: Position Limits - Per-Instrument
requirements.description: Maximum position sizes enforced per instrument/account
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: Position check: proposed_position + current_position <= max_position_per_coin

requirements.title: Notional Exposure Caps
requirements.description: Total market exposure constraints
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: Notional check: sum(position[*] * price[*]) <= max_notional_exposure

requirements.title: Margin Requirements
requirements.description: Minimum margin monitoring and enforcement
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: Margin check: available_margin >= required_margin; reject if insufficient

requirements.title: Real-Time Monitoring
requirements.description: Continuous position tracking and threshold alerts
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: Position and margin monitored every 1 second minimum; alerts on threshold breach

requirements.title: Dynamic Risk Parameters
requirements.description: Risk limits adjustable based on market volatility
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: Risk limits scale with IV; high_volatility → tighter limits; versioned with change tracking

requirements.title: Hard Stop-Loss Implementation
requirements.description: Local stop-loss + exchange-side conditional orders
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: Every position has: local_stop_loss AND exchange_conditional_order at same level; both trigger close

requirements.title: ATR Dynamic Distance
requirements.description: Stop-loss distance scaled by ATR (Average True Range)
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: Stop_loss = entry ± (atr_multiplier × atr); atr_multiplier >= 1.5

requirements.title: Correlation Gates
requirements.description: Reject positions if correlation to existing portfolio exceeds threshold
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: New position correlation to portfolio > 0.8 is rejected (or reduces size)

requirements.title: Risk Violations - Detailed Audit Records
requirements.description: All risk violations logged with context
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: Risk rejection includes: reason_code, metric_value, limit, proposed_action, timestamp

requirements.title: Risk Parameters - Persistent and Versioned
requirements.description: Risk parameters stored persistently with version tracking
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: Risk limits stored in DB with version_id and change_timestamp; rollback capability

requirements.title: Risk State Reconciliation
requirements.description: Risk state must be reconcilable with exchange and internal accounting
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: Position check: local_position == exchange_position (after 5 retries); mismatch triggers alert

EX-02_OMS_ORDER_LIFECYCLE.document_title: OMS & Order Lifecycle / 委託管理系統與訂單生命週期

requirements.title: 11-State Order Lifecycle
requirements.description: Comprehensive state machine for order management with reconciliation gate
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: OMS implements all 11 states: CREATED, VALIDATED, SUBMITTED, PENDING, PARTIAL_FILL, FILLED, CANCEL_REQUESTED, CANCELLED, REJECTED, FAILED, EXPIRED

requirements.title: Reconciliation Gate - Paper vs Live/Demo
requirements.description: Position consistency checks between paper, demo, and live trading
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: Before execution, reconciliation check validates: local_position == exchange_position; mismatch blocks

requirements.title: Position Consistency - Paper vs Exchange
requirements.description: Daily P&L reconciliation with exchange; position matching
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: Reconciliation job runs daily; compares: local_position vs exchange_position, paper_pnl vs exchange_pnl

requirements.title: Fill Matching - Execution Verification
requirements.description: Verify all fills received from exchange match submitted orders
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: Each fill from exchange matched to order_id; fill_qty, fill_price recorded; discrepancies logged

requirements.title: Conflict Resolution
requirements.description: Automated detection and resolution of local vs exchange state conflicts
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: Mismatch detected → 5 retry attempts with backoff; if still failed → escalate to MANUAL_REVIEW

EX-05_LEARNING_TIERS_AUTONOMY.document_title: Learning Tiers & Autonomy / 學習層級與自主性

requirements.title: L1-L5 Learning Tier Progression
requirements.description: Analyst Agent evolves through 5 learning tiers with specific criteria
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: Each tier has promotion criteria; progression gates active_tier >= required_tier

requirements.title: L1 Post-Trade Review
requirements.description: Post-trade analysis and basic feedback
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: After each trade, system logs: entry_reason, exit_reason, pnl, cost_efficiency

requirements.title: L2 Pattern Discovery
requirements.description: Identify repeating patterns and correlations
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: System identifies patterns with >= 10 occurrences; win_rate per pattern tracked

requirements.title: L3+ Advanced Learning
requirements.description: Model training, backtesting, parameter optimization
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: New models validated on hold-out test set; Sharpe > baseline before live deployment

requirements.title: Training Data Isolation
requirements.description: ML models train only on approved historical datasets
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: Training data is separate from live trading data; 30+ day delay before live data usable

requirements.title: Feature Engineering Boundaries
requirements.description: Restricted set of allowed market/internal features
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: Feature whitelist defined; model training only uses approved features

requirements.title: Model Update Frequency Controls
requirements.description: Controls on when and how often models are updated
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: Model updates limited to: weekly minimum, daily maximum; all changes logged

requirements.title: Backtesting Validation
requirements.description: Mandatory backtesting before deploying model updates
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: New model backtested on 1-year historical data; Sharpe >= baseline before approval

requirements.title: Live Testing Limits
requirements.description: Controlled rollout of new models with position caps
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: New model: 7 days shadow mode (no trades) → 7 days limited_size (50%) → full_size after 14 days

requirements.title: Feedback Loop Control
requirements.description: Prevents data leakage between live trading and training data
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: Live trading data isolated until 30 days post-trade; training uses approved historical data only

requirements.title: Model Drift Detection
requirements.description: Automatic flagging when model performance degrades
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: Daily: compare current_prediction_distribution vs training_distribution; anomaly detected if KL_divergence > threshold

requirements.title: Model Training - Asynchronous Non-Blocking
requirements.description: Model training must be asynchronous and non-blocking to execution
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: Training runs in separate process; order execution never waits for training completion

requirements.title: Production Models - Deterministic Reproducible
requirements.description: Production model decisions are deterministic and reproducible
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: Same input features always produce same prediction; model versioned by hash

requirements.title: Model Versioning - Change Tracking & Rollback
requirements.description: All model updates tracked with rollback capability
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: Model_version_id stored with each prediction; rollback to previous version possible within 1 hour

requirements.title: Model Performance Monitoring
requirements.description: Continuously monitored against baseline
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: Daily: Sharpe(current) >= Sharpe(baseline); if < 50%, automatic rollback triggered

EX-06_AGENT_CONFLICT_ARBITRATION.document_title: Agent Conflict Arbitration / 代理衝突仲裁

requirements.title: Scout/Conductor Pattern
requirements.description: OpenClaw as Conductor coordinating specialized agents
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: Central OpenClaw orchestrator routes messages between Scout, Strategist, Executor, Guardian, Analyst

requirements.title: Fact vs Inference vs Hypothesis Distinction
requirements.description: Clear boundary between observed facts, derived inferences, and speculative hypotheses
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: Each message tagged with: FACT (from exchange), INFERENCE (derived), or HYPOTHESIS (speculative)

EX-07_AGENT_DATA_ACCESS_CONTROL.document_title: Agent Data Access Control / 代理數據存取控制

requirements.title: Cross-SM Authorization
requirements.description: Data access controlled across state machines
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: Agent can only access data if authorized by governance layer; audit all access attempts

requirements.title: Data Flow Control
requirements.description: Formal control of data flow between components
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: All inter-module data transfers logged with: source, destination, data_type, timestamp, access_granted/denied

HIST-01_CORE_DESIGN_OVERVIEW.document_title: Core Design Overview / 核心設計總綱

requirements.title: Separation of Concerns - Layered Design
requirements.description: Data plane (perception) isolated from control plane (decisions), independent risk layer, non-blocking learning
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: Code structure shows clear layers: perception.py, decision.py, risk.py, learning.py; zero cross-layer coupling

requirements.title: State Machine Pattern - Explicit State
requirements.description: All workflows modeled as explicit state machines with deterministic, auditable transitions
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: SM-01, SM-02, SM-04, EX-02 all implement state machine pattern; no implicit state

requirements.title: Agent-Based Orchestration - Async Communication
requirements.description: Specialized agents with async message-based communication, not monolithic controller
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: OpenClaw coordinator receives messages from 6 agents; routes async, no RPC calls

requirements.title: Risk-First Governance
requirements.description: Risk control is fundamental, not bolted-on; all decisions bounded by risk parameters
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: Every order submission gates through EX-01 risk checks; no bypass path exists

requirements.title: Auditability and Compliance
requirements.description: Every action logged with context; complete decision tree; deterministic replay capability
requirements.specific_testable_requirement: Given any trade_id, audit trail shows: pre-state, basis, risk_approval, authorization, execution, result

critical_path.requirement: SM-02 leases cannot proceed without SM-01 AUTHORIZED state
Orders cannot execute without active SM-02 lease
All orders must pass EX-01 risk validation before submission
SM-04 RISK_LOCKED blocks all new order submissions
H0 gate must execute first on every decision

mandatory_rules: All orders must pass pre-trade risk checks (EX-01)
Risk Governor (SM-04) can veto any order submission
Learning updates (EX-05) never block trading execution
Multi-agent coordination (EX-06) via async message bus only

phase_1_critical: SM-02 Decision Lease State Machine (3 days)
SM-04 Risk Governor State Machine (3 days)
Executor Single Write Port Module (3 days)

success_criteria: Proves effectiveness on net PnL basis
Progressively earns more autonomy in verified scenarios
Zero external AI cost achieves basic positive return
testing_requirements: Deterministic replay of exact trading sequence
Chaos testing for agent failure scenarios
Risk scenario testing for boundary conditions
